description: Intent-only request: classify a scheduled log-anomaly scan as workflow-anchored with an agent embedded for the reasoning-heavy analysis.

conversation.text: Every morning at 8am, have an agent scan our overnight error logs, identify unusual patterns, and post a summary to the #eng-oncall Slack channel.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the scheduled trigger and Slack notification form a workflow shell, while the open-ended anomaly identification in the logs is reasoning-dominated work suited to an embedded agent step.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
